behavior_summary: U8P_ENDPLATE::gotHit reacts when an ENDPLATE pedestal is struck: it validates the incoming hit (quality and type), maps the pedestal's animation frame to one of five elemental 'stone' globals (ether/earth/water/air/fire) and sets that flag.

On a valid hit it spawns short-lived visual/audio effects by creating temporary items (Item::create / Item::pop), playing SFX, and launching helper processes (U8P_ENDPLATE::03E1, U8P_ENDPLATE::0453 and several frame-range animators) to animate the pedestal and effects asynchronously.

It sums the five elemental flags and, when all five are set, triggers a larger multi-stage reaction: closes UI (closeAllGumps), spawns a LightningBolt process, runs repeated effect/pop/animation sequences, may put the avatar in stasis, and orders NPC pathfinding — all orchestrated mainly by spawning helper processes.
U8P_ENDPLATE::release scans related pedestals to clear the corresponding elemental global when a pedestal is released (Event 9), reversing the state set by U8P_ENDPLATE::gotHit.
notable_control_flow: Early guard checks: the function returns quickly when the hit's 'quality' is zero or when the hit item type is not the expected pedestal type (compares Item::getType to a constant).
Frame-dispatch: Item::getFrame is used to determine which elemental flag to set; a switch-like mapping directs to five distinct globals.

Asynchronous sequencing: most animation and cleanup work is delegated to spawned helper processes (U8P_ENDPLATE::03E1, ::0453, ::05B9, ::0617, ::0675, ::06D3) so U8P_ENDPLATE::gotHit composes effects rather than performing long blocking work.

Completion branch: when the sum of stone globals equals five, the function performs a different, larger branch that closes gumps, spawns a LightningBolt process, repeatedly pops effect items and animates frames, and performs gameplay side effects (avatar stasis / NPC pathfinding).
Loop/frame progression inside U8P_ENDPLATE::release; treated as control-flow, not explicit internal call.
open_questions: Exact mapping of pedestal frame indices to element names (ether/earth/water/air/fire) is inferred from behavior but exact numeric frame->element mapping is not explicit here.
Concrete SFX ids, LightningBolt parameters, and the duration/value used by setAvatarInStasis are not shown and remain unknown.
Whether the second parameter (BP+0Ah) is always an equipment index/slot or sometimes a different data (it appears to be an index/slot in common cases but this is inferred).
The intended gameplay consequence after the full five-stone reaction (beyond spawned effects and NPC pathfinding) is not fully specified by the script alone.

main_function.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::gotHit
main_function.purpose: Respond to an 'item got hit' event on an ENDPLATE pedestal: validate the hit, set the corresponding elemental stone global, spawn visual/audio effects and helper processes, and, when all five elemental stones are active, trigger a larger scene reaction (lightning, stasis, NPC movement).
entry_conditions: Triggered on Event 6 ('U8P_ENDPLATE::gotHit') for the ENDPLATE script.
Called with parameters: (item handle/pointer at BP+06h, index/slot or secondary parameter at BP+0Ah).
Only proceeds if Item::getQuality on the hit is nonzero and Item::getType equals the expected pedestal type (constant, inferred 0x0319).

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::gotHit
function_map.role: Main event handler for pedestal being struck; sets elemental flags, spawns effects, handles full-reaction logic.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::release
function_map.role: Handle release (Event 9): scan pedestals and clear elemental globals when matching frames/items are found.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::03E1
function_map.role: Short-lived visual/audio effect: play SFXs and advance item frame from 0 up to a limit while setting frames and occasional special SFX.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::0453
function_map.role: Randomized dispatcher: use urandom and the global 'yojustchill' to pick among several visual/audio behaviors and spawn other helper animators.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::05B9
function_map.role: Animate frame-range 0x17..0x1E on an item, spawning small effects between frame advances (gated by 'yojustchill').

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::0617
function_map.role: Animate frame-range 0x1F..0x27 on an item with similar behavior to ::05B9.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::0675
function_map.role: Animate frame-range 0x28..0x2E on an item with similar behavior to other range-animators.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::06D3
function_map.role: Animate frame-range 0x2F..0x31 on an item with similar behavior to other range-animators.

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn a short-lived audio/visual helper to animate frames and play SFX for the pedestal/effect item.
Spawn a randomized dispatcher helper that will spawn further animators or play varied SFX sequences to enrich the reaction.
Dispatch to a frame-range animator (one of several) based on random choice.
Dispatch to a frame-range animator (one of several) based on random choice.
Dispatch to a frame-range animator (one of several) based on random choice.
Dispatch to a frame-range animator (one of several) based on random choice.

external_calls.purpose: Read the hit item's quality to guard behavior and to index into the element/frame mapping.
Verify the hit target is the expected pedestal type before proceeding (type compared to a constant).
Reset kernel/process references for the item before manipulating it (safety/preparation step).
Obtain pedestal frame to decide which elemental global to set and which animation branch to take.
Allocate temporary effect items to be popped into the world for visual effects.
Get X coordinate of the pedestal so created/pop'd effects are placed relative to it.
Get Y coordinate of the pedestal for effect placement.
Get Z coordinate of the pedestal for effect placement.
Place the created effect item into the world with the appropriate frame/flags to show an effect.
Launch helper processes (effect animators, FREE spawns, LightningBolt) to run asynchronously.
Play sound effects during hits and during the multistage reaction.
Create a global lightning effect when all five stones are activated.
Clean up temporary effect item handles after their short lifetime.
Temporarily halt the avatar (likely to control player movement during the big reaction).
Order NPC movement as part of the reaction sequence (likely to reposition NPCs during the event).
Close UI windows before playing the major visual reaction to avoid UI occlusion.
Obtain a small random value to vary which helper behaviors or SFX are selected.
Animate pedestal/effect item visuals by directly setting item frames in helper loops.

reads.name: yojustchill
reads.likely_effect: Acts as a global toggle to suppress or early-exit animation/spawn-heavy helper behaviors; when nonzero many helpers skip spawning or terminate early.

writes.name: etherstone
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when the corresponding pedestal/frame (ether) is hit; used in the five-stone completion check. Cleared by U8P_ENDPLATE::release.

writes.name: firestone
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when the corresponding pedestal/frame (fire) is hit; used in the five-stone completion check. Cleared by U8P_ENDPLATE::release.

writes.name: waterstone
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when the corresponding pedestal/frame (water) is hit; used in the five-stone completion check. Cleared by U8P_ENDPLATE::release.

writes.name: airstone
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when the corresponding pedestal/frame (air) is hit; used in the five-stone completion check. Cleared by U8P_ENDPLATE::release.

writes.name: earthstone
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when the corresponding pedestal/frame (earth) is hit; used in the five-stone completion check. Cleared by U8P_ENDPLATE::release.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_ENDPLATE::gotHit reacts when an ENDPLATE pedestal is struck: it validates the incoming hit (quality and type), maps the pedestal's animation frame to one of five elemental 'stone' globals (ether/earth/water/air/fire) and sets that flag.
